H-OS-L1.name: Pebble
H-OS-L1.sphere: n=96, mean=7.1, std=1.82, 66% positive, strong confidence. Distribution strong right tail with mode 8. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, ~10-minute settle, strong music liking. Highest YouTube views in HEALING (29).
H-OS-L1.sphere_plain: Strongly liked and effective for overstimulation, helping people feel better after ten minutes with good reach.

H-OS-L2.name: Rainfall
H-OS-L2.sphere: n=52, mean=6.83, std=1.84, 63% positive, strong confidence. Distribution right-skewed. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, bimodal settle (immediate vs >10min), mixed music opinion. Low YouTube views (5).
H-OS-L2.sphere_plain: Helpful for overstimulation with effects in about ten minutes, though some find the sound merely okay.

H-OS-L3.name: Glacier
H-OS-L3.sphere: n=47, mean=7.04, std=1.68, 64% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution normal-approx. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, 5-10min settle, split use (sleep/work). Notable entrepreneurial drift (sim=0.739). Low YouTube views (8).
H-OS-L3.sphere_plain: Consistently helps after five to ten minutes, with balanced appeal for both sleep and work situations.

H-AX-L1.name: Meadow
H-AX-L1.sphere: n=67, mean=7.22, std=1.93, 63% positive, strong confidence. Distribution right-skewed with mode 8-9. Qualitative: mixed listener types, moderate improvement, ~10-minute settle. Highest YouTube views in dataset (29).
H-AX-L1.sphere_plain: Most people feel moderately better after about ten minutes, with consistently positive results and good initial discovery.

H-AX-L2.name: Cottage
H-AX-L2.sphere: n=48, mean=6.94, std=1.62, 67% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution centered at 7-8. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, split 5/20 minute settle. Low YouTube views (6).
H-AX-L2.sphere_plain: People notice clear benefits in about five minutes, with reliable outcomes despite limited online visibility.

H-AX-L3.name: Valley
H-AX-L3.sphere: n=36, mean=7.08, std=1.89, 61% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution mildly right-skewed. Qualitative: moderate improvement, ~10-minute settle, some 'no effect' from supporters. Very low YouTube views (4).
H-AX-L3.sphere_plain: Generally helpful for anxiety after ten minutes, though some supporters see less effect than expected.

H-CR-L1.name: Anchor
H-CR-L1.sphere: n=43, mean=6.35, std=1.7, 53% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution left-skewed as expected for crisis. Qualitative: significant improvement reports, rapid settle (~5 min). Very low YouTube views (6).
H-CR-L1.sphere_plain: In crisis moments, many feel significant relief quickly, though results vary based on starting distress level.

H-CR-L2.name: Harbor
H-CR-L2.sphere: n=35, mean=6.4, std=1.72, 51% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution similar to L1. Qualitative: moderate improvement, split settle times, neutral music opinions common. Very low YouTube views (4).
H-CR-L2.sphere_plain: Offers modest relief in acute distress with effects felt in five to ten minutes, but music reception varies.

H-CR-L3.name: Horizon
H-CR-L3.sphere: n=27, mean=6.52, std=1.91, 52% positive, meaningful confidence. Slightly higher tail than L1/L2. Qualitative: fastest settle in crisis series (immediate-2min), mixed music opinion. Very low YouTube views (5).
H-CR-L3.sphere_plain: Works fastest for crisis relief (often immediate), but some people dislike the sound, affecting consistency.

H-SL-L1.name: Lantern
H-SL-L1.sphere: n=55, mean=7.16, std=1.85, 64% positive, strong confidence. Distribution right-skewed. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, rapid settle (<5min), strong music liking. Notable drift (sim=0.694). Very low YouTube views (4).
H-SL-L1.sphere_plain: Effective for sleep support, helping many feel better within five minutes with strong sound approval.

H-SL-L2.name: Hammock
H-SL-L2.sphere: n=45, mean=7.09, std=1.55, 67% positive, meaningful confidence. Tightest HEALING distribution (std=1.55). Qualitative: noticeable improvement but notable neutral music (6/15), client/heavy listener mix. Notable drift (sim=0.829). Very low YouTube views (5).
H-SL-L2.sphere_plain: Often works for sleep but some find it neutral-sounding, especially when used during travel or chores.

H-SL-L3.name: Midnight
H-SL-L3.sphere: n=29, mean=7.1, std=1.65, 66% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution centered at 7-8. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, rapid settle, mixed music opinion. Notable drift (sim=0.763). Very low YouTube views (3).
H-SL-L3.sphere_plain: Generally helps people relax quickly, with mixed but mostly positive feedback on the sound experience.

T-FC-L1.name: Compass
T-FC-L1.sphere: n=41, mean=6.46, std=1.82, 56% positive, meaningful confidence. Broad distribution. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, rapid settle, 'slightly busy' rhythm complaints. Very low YouTube views (5).
T-FC-L1.sphere_plain: Gives modest focus improvements for many, often felt quickly, but some find the rhythm slightly distracting.

T-FC-L2.name: Waypoint
T-FC-L2.sphere: n=32, mean=7.19, std=1.6, 66% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution centered at 8-9. Qualitative: moderate-significant improvement, 10-minute settle, mixed music. Notable drift (sim=0.751). Low YouTube views (4).
T-FC-L2.sphere_plain: Provides solid focus benefits after ten minutes, with good results and mixed but generally positive sound feedback.

T-FC-L3.name: Summit
T-FC-L3.sphere: n=34, mean=7.56, std=1.96, 71% positive, meaningful confidence. Strong bimodality (peaks at 6-7 and 10). Qualitative: significant improvement, 10-minute settle, strong music liking. Highest THRIVING YouTube views (12).
T-FC-L3.sphere_plain: Highest focus scores in the set, with significant improvements reported after ten minutes and strong sound approval.

T-CF-L1.name: Ember
T-CF-L1.sphere: n=35, mean=6.74, std=1.7, 54% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution mildly left-skewed. Qualitative: slight to moderate improvement, variable settle times. Low YouTube views (2).
T-CF-L1.sphere_plain: Provides small creative boosts, sometimes immediately, but results depend heavily on the user's state.

T-CF-L2.name: Current
T-CF-L2.sphere: n=25, mean=6.72, std=1.43, 56% positive, meaningful confidence. Narrow distribution. Qualitative: moderate-significant improvement, strong music satisfaction. Very low YouTube views (2).
T-CF-L2.sphere_plain: Delivers reliable moderate creative gains with strong musical appreciation, usually after a short session.

T-CF-L3.name: Aurora
T-CF-L3.sphere: n=18, mean=7.28, std=1.32, 67% positive, developing confidence. Lowest THRIVING variance, highest mean. Qualitative: high engagement (25/18 1-min responses), moderate improvement, balanced rhythm. Low YouTube views (7).
T-CF-L3.sphere_plain: Most effective creative flow protocol with strong, consistent results and good musical engagement.

T-MB-L1.name: Stone
T-MB-L1.sphere: n=26, mean=7.08, std=1.32, 65% positive, meaningful confidence. Compact distribution. Qualitative: moderate-significant improvement, long settle (~20min), neutral music common. Notable drift (sim=0.764). Very low YouTube views (3).
T-MB-L1.sphere_plain: Helps balance and stability, but requires about twenty minutes to settle, with neutral sound reception common.

T-MB-L2.name: Axis
T-MB-L2.sphere: n=22, mean=6.68, std=2.03, 59% positive, meaningful confidence. Highest THRIVING variance. Qualitative: moderate improvement, mixed settle times, split listener types. Highest drift observed (sim=0.675). Low YouTube views (4).
T-MB-L2.sphere_plain: Mixed results for stability - some improve significantly while others see little change, with variable settling.

T-MB-L3.name: Orbit
T-MB-L3.sphere: n=14, mean=6.86, std=1.7, 71% positive, developing confidence. Small sample, high positive rate. Qualitative: noticeable improvement but unique 'Did NOT settle' reports (4/19). Notable drift (sim=0.734). Very low YouTube views (3).
T-MB-L3.sphere_plain: Most people notice benefits quickly, but a substantial number report no settling effect at all.

X-ME-L1.name: Breeze
X-ME-L1.sphere: n=38, mean=6.68, std=1.93, 53% positive, meaningful confidence. Moderate spread. Qualitative: balanced improvement, long settle (~20min), strong music liking. Low YouTube views (5).
X-ME-L1.sphere_plain: Provides modest energy and mood lifts for many, usually after longer listening with strong musical approval.

X-ME-L2.name: Sunrise
X-ME-L2.sphere: n=24, mean=6.71, std=1.73, 62% positive, meaningful confidence. Tight distribution. Qualitative: significant improvement, variable settle, strong music liking. Low YouTube views (8).
X-ME-L2.sphere_plain: Most effective energy/mood protocol with significant gains for many, variable timing, and strong musical approval.

X-ME-L3.name: Updraft
X-ME-L3.sphere: n=17, mean=6.24, std=1.79, 53% positive, developing confidence. Moderate spread. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, 5-10min settle, mixed music opinion. Low YouTube views (4).
X-ME-L3.sphere_plain: Gives moderate mood improvements with mixed timing and varied musical feedback, showing inconsistent results.

X-MD-L1.name: Footpath
X-MD-L1.sphere: n=21, mean=6.24, std=1.97, 43% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution leans low. Qualitative: noticeable-significant improvement, rapid settle (~5min). Low YouTube views (4).
X-MD-L1.sphere_plain: Gives modest motivation boosts for many, often felt quickly, but results are inconsistent across users.

X-MD-L2.name: Trail
X-MD-L2.sphere: n=14, mean=6.0, std=1.57, 36% positive, developing confidence. Lowest positive rate in dataset. Qualitative: moderate-slight improvement, long settle (~20min). Low YouTube views (7).
X-MD-L2.sphere_plain: Least effective motivation protocol, with only about a third noticing any improvement and slow settling.

X-MD-L3.name: Switchback
X-MD-L3.sphere: n=12, mean=6.92, std=2.31, 58% positive, developing confidence. High variance, some high scores. Qualitative: moderate improvement, rapid settle (~5min), isolated analytically (mean sim 0.582). Low YouTube views (7).
X-MD-L3.sphere_plain: Inconsistent motivation results - some users report strong benefits while others see little change.

X-MC-L1.name: Cavern
X-MC-L1.sphere: n=23, mean=6.65, std=1.58, 52% positive, meaningful confidence. Distribution mild right-skew. Qualitative: noticeable improvement, loved music, some worsening reports (8%). Low YouTube views (8).
X-MC-L1.sphere_plain: Moderately helps mental clarity for about half of users, with strong musical approval but some negative reports.

X-MC-L2.name: Starlight
X-MC-L2.sphere: n=15, mean=6.6, std=1.45, 53% positive, developing confidence. Tight distribution. Qualitative: significant improvement, rapid settle, 20% 'no effect'. Moderate YouTube views (11).
X-MC-L2.sphere_plain: Similar to X-MC-L1 with reliable results and strong musical liking, but some find it ineffective.

X-MC-L3.name: Cosmos
X-MC-L3.sphere: n=9, mean=5.33, std=2.29, 44% positive, developing confidence. Strong left-skew, many low scores. Qualitative: noticeable improvement but 2 'worse' reports, isolated analytically. Low YouTube views (8).
X-MC-L3.sphere_plain: Least effective protocol in the set, with many reporting little to no benefit and some feeling worse.

sphere_commentary.overview: The three series show distinct efficacy profiles aligned with design intent. HEALING (n=580, mean=6.95, std=1.78) demonstrates highest consistency, particularly in acute stress contexts. THRIVING (n=247, mean=6.94, std=1.7) shows strongest performance, especially in Focus & Clarity protocols. TRANSFORMING (n=173, mean=6.47, std=1.83) exhibits widest dispersion, consistent with ascending-arc design but suggesting relative underperformance versus other series.
sphere_commentary.cross_series: HEALING protocols cluster tightly with lowest variance across entry points, reflecting reliable nervous system regulation. THRIVING shows highest mean scores and strong positive sentiment, particularly in Focus & Clarity (peaking at 7.56), indicating effective cognitive optimization. TRANSFORMING displays expected spread for ascending-arc work but with concerning patterns in Motivation & Drive and inverse efficacy in Mind & Clarity requiring investigation.
sphere_commentary.anomalies:
• X-MC-L3 (n=9) mean 5.33, std 2.29, 44% positive – inverse efficacy in DESCENT protocol suggesting design or population mismatch.
• X-MD-L2 (n=14) mean 6.0, std 1.57, 36% positive – lowest-performing protocol indicating potential ASCENT failure.
• Bimodal distributions in H-CR-L2, X-MC-L2 suggest subgroup effects needing investigation.
• Notable semantic drift (>20 protocols with similarity <0.85) indicates evolving interpretations or analytical instability.
sphere_commentary.development_signals:
• X-MC-L3 (n=9) low mean 5.33 – investigate protocol depth or add pre-screening for listener suitability.
• X-MD-L1/L2/L3 (n=21/14/12) consistently underperform TRANSFORMING mean – test ASCENT timing adjustments or receptor-specific dosing.
• H-OS-L1 (n=96, mean 7.1, views 29) strong outcome with low exposure – boost discoverability via playlist placement.
• T-FC-L3 (n=34, mean 7.56) highest THRIVING score – prioritize promotion and create L2 variant for scaling.
• T-MB-L3 (n=14) unique 'Did NOT settle' reports – examine HOST protocol suitability for Maintenance & Density.
sphere_commentary.embedding_analysis: Cross-run drift shows significant analytical instability with all protocols below 0.87 similarity (25 below 0.83), most notably T-MB-L2 (0.675), H-SL-L1 (0.694), X-MD-L3 (0.737). H-AX-L1/L2 remain tightly clustered (sim 0.831) while X-MD-L3 is most isolated (mean sim 0.582). Limited to 3 run histories makes drift estimates provisional; treat as early-warning signal requiring longer observation for validation.
